raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Wash the exposed skin thoroughly with plenty of water.
STEP 2: Apply sterile dressings if needed after washing.
DO NOT: Do not leave the chemical on the skin after exposure.
ESCALATE: Consult a skin specialist.

immediate_steps: Wash the exposed skin thoroughly with plenty of water.
Apply sterile dressings if needed after washing.
do_not_do: Do not leave the chemical on the skin after exposure.
